 {"id":"bd-31ae","title":"Document labels-as-state pattern for operational state","description":"Labels on role beads cache current operational state for fast queries.

Convention: <dimension>:<value>
- patrol:muted / patrol:active
- mode:degraded / mode:normal
- status:idle / status:working

Pattern:
1. Create event bead (full context, immutable history)
2. Update role bead labels (current state cache)

No schema change needed - labels already exist. This task:
- Document the convention in beads docs
- Consider helper: bd state <role> <dimension> (queries label)
- Consider helper: bd set-state <role> <dimension>=<value> (creates event + updates label)

Events are source of truth. Labels are cache.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T15:15:46.697971-08:00","created_by":"gastown/crew/max","updated_at":"2025-12-30T18:12:30.961022-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T15:51:34.364561-08:00","close_reason":"Added 'Labels as State Cache' section to docs/LABELS.md with convention, pattern, examples, and best practices"}
 {"id":"bd-325da116","title":"Fix N-way collision convergence","description":"Epic to fix the N-way collision convergence problem documented in n-way-collision-convergence.md.

## Problem Summary
The current collision resolution implementation works correctly for 2-way collisions but does not converge for 3-way (and by extension N-way) collisions. TestThreeCloneCollision demonstrates this with reproducible failures.

## Root Causes Identified
1. Pairwise resolution doesn't scale - each clone makes local decisions without global context
2. DetectCollisions modifies state during detection (line 83-86 in collision.go)
3. No remapping history - can't track transitive remap chains (test-1 → test-2 → test-3)
4. Import-time resolution is too late - happens after git merge

## Solution Architecture
Replace pairwise resolution with deterministic global N-way resolution using:
- Content-addressable identity (content hashing)
- Global collision resolution (sort all versions by hash)
- Read-only detection phase (separate from modification)
- Idempotent imports (content-first matching)

## Success Criteria
- TestThreeCloneCollision passes without skipping
- All clones converge to identical content after final pull
- No data loss (all issues present in all clones)
- Works for N workers (test with 5+ clones)
- Idempotent imports (importing same JSONL multiple times is safe)

## Implementation Phases
See child issues for detailed breakdown of each phase.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-10-29T23:05:13.889079-07:00","updated_at":"2025-10-31T11:59:41.031668-07:00","closed_at":"2025-10-31T11:59:41.031668-07:00"}

 {"id":"bd-32nm","title":"Auto-configure git merge driver during `bd init`","description":"Enhance `bd init` to optionally set up beads-merge as git merge driver.

**Tasks**:
- Prompt user to install git merge driver
- Configure `.git/config`: `merge.beads.driver "bd merge %A %O %L %R"`
- Create/update `.gitattributes`: `.beads/beads.jsonl merge=beads`
- Add `--skip-merge-driver` flag for non-interactive use
- Update AGENTS.md onboarding section

**Files**:
- `cmd/bd/init.go`
- `.gitattributes` template","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-05T18:42:20.447682-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-05T19:27:18.370494-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-05T19:27:18.370494-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-32nm","depends_on_id":"bd-qqvw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-11-05T18:42:28.723517-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-32nm","depends_on_id":"bd-omx1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-11-05T18:42:35.453823-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3396","title":"Add merge helper commands (bd sync --merge)","description":"Add commands to merge beads branch back to main.

Tasks:
- Implement bd sync --merge command
- Implement bd sync --status command
- Implement bd sync --auto-merge (optional, for automation)
- Detect merge conflicts and provide guidance
- Show commit diff between branches
- Verify main branch is clean before merge
- Push merged changes to remote
